creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dimitry, can you MFC Clang/libc++ 6 to /stable/11 before code slush 2018-04-20 ? It should help C++11 (or later) adoption in upstream projects that only do QA for released FreeBSD versions.
https://www.freebsd.org/releases/11.2R/schedule.html

FWIW, Rust 1.25 (scheduled on 2018-03-29) will use bundled LLVM 6.0. It appears to have a weird __atomic* issue on i386.
https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/47828
https://github.com/rust-lang/llvm/commit/93250244ee5d
